title: Create Journey
description: This modpack is mainly focused on exploration and the create mod, but also includes things like magic. With the main focus of the modpack being exploration most structures are spread out quite far to encourage exploration far beyond conventional means.
body:
# Introduction
This pack aims to give the player a large world to explore and build machines and structures in with beatiful enviroments. It also heavily encourages using the create mod for its trains to move around since most structures have had their spawnrate lowered heavily.
## Main features
This pack includes mods like create to help with moving across long distances and producing food and other essential resources; Better End to give the end a little more charm and give the player a reason to explore the end more than the usual simple search for an end city; Many world generation and structure mods to generate a beatiful landscape filled with the occaisonal structure to keep the player interested in exploring further and further since there is always another structure that hasn't been encountered before; Antique Atlas to help with coordination but not give a 100% detailed world map.
